case_title: WILDGANS, TIMOTHY vs. FAST FRY OF USA, INC., DBA FAST FRY OF CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILDGANS, TIMOTHY AS TO DEFENDANT FAST FRY OF USA, INC., DBA FAST FRY OF CALIFORNIA
